name: Payroll Diversion / Invoice Fraud Actors
description: Payroll Diversion and Invoice Fraud Actors are financially motivated criminal groups that target payroll systems, accounts payable processes, vendor invoices, and employee compensation workflows to redirect legitimate payments into attacker-controlled accounts.
